root.sql: select sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_name||' '||sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_surname as member_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_share_mem.share_stock , trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '1' ) || pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '2' ) || pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '3' ) || pka_com_function.fp_get_member_address_letter( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , '0' , '4' )) as member_address from sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_prename , sc_mem_m_share_mem , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_status_code = '0' and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code and sc_mem_m_share_mem.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = '100' order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no

r_port_member_status_summary_nest_coll.sql: select sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) as membername from sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_lon_m_loan_card where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ order by sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no

r_port_member_status_summary_nest_loan.sql: select ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ORDER BY sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ASC) as row_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no ) as membername , sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance , sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ) begining_of_contract_thai , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no ) as collname from sc_lon_m_contract_coll , sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = '05955' order by sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no , sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no

r_port_member_status_summary_nest_gain.sql: select sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.membership_no , trim(sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.gain_name||' '||sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.gain_surname) as gainname , sc_mem_m_ucf_concern.related_na from sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain , sc_mem_m_ucf_concern where sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.conceern_code = sc_mem_m_ucf_concern.conceern_code and sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.membership_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.membership_no = '01960' order by sc_mem_m_member_recrieve_gain.rec_no

r_port_member_status_summary_nest_dep.sql: select sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no , sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_balance , pka_com_function.fp_form_depno( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no ) as deposit_account_no_form , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_opened_date) as deposit_opened_tdate from sc_dep_m_creditor , sc_dep_m_rule where ( sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_type_code = sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code ) and ( ( sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status is NULL ) or ( sc_dep_m_creditor.close_status <> 'C' ) and ( sc_dep_m_rule.insure_status = '0' ) ) and sc_dep_m_rule.invest_status = '0' and sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ order by sc_dep_m_creditor.membership_no , sc_dep_m_creditor.deposit_account_no

r_port_member_status_summary_nest_crem.sql:
select * from (
select membership_no , crem_type , crem_name_shot , crem_number from view_tel_det_crem_gain_01
union
select membership_no , crem_type , crem_name_shot , crem_number from view_tel_det_crem_gain_02
union
select membership_no , crem_type , crem_name_shot , crem_number from view_tel_det_crem_gain_03
union
select membership_no , crem_type , crem_name_shot , crem_number from view_tel_det_crem_gain_04
) tab where 1=1 and membership_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ --and membership_no = '01960' order by membership_no , crem_type , crem_number
